calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ksenia Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sarah Lerschen #6213.
Petitioner Maria Rosalba Gonzalez was present in pro per as guardian ad litem for the Minor Josue Gonzalez Bonilla, Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Minor's Father Jose Oscar Bonilla was also present in court and consented to the name change of the minor.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Josue Bonilla-Gonzalez.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
